verses.latin_vulgate: Deus misereatur nostri, et benedicat nobis ;  illuminet vultum suum super nos, et misereatur nostri :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֱֽלֹהִ֗ים יְחׇנֵּ֥נוּ וִיבָרְכֵ֑נוּ יָ֤אֵֽר־פָּנָ֖יו אִתָּ֣נוּ סֶֽלָה׃
verses.king_james: God be merciful unto us, and bless us; and cause his face to shine upon us; Selah.

verses.latin_vulgate: ut cognoscamus in terra viam tuam,  in omnibus gentibus salutare tuum.
verses.king_james: That thy way may be known upon earth, thy saving health among all nations.

verses.latin_vulgate: Confiteantur tibi populi, Deus :  confiteantur tibi populi omnes.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יוֹד֖וּךָ עַמִּ֥ים ׀ אֱלֹהִ֑ים י֝וֹד֗וּךָ עַמִּ֥ים כֻּלָּֽם׃
verses.king_james: Let the people praise thee, O God; let all the people praise thee.

verses.latin_vulgate: Lætentur et exsultent gentes,  quoniam judicas populos in æquitate,  et gentes in terra dirigis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יִ֥שְׂמְח֥וּ וִירַנְּנ֗וּ לְאֻ֫מִּ֥ים כִּֽי־תִשְׁפֹּ֣ט עַמִּ֣ים מִישֹׁ֑ר וּלְאֻמִּ֓ים ׀ בָּאָ֖רֶץ תַּנְחֵ֣ם סֶֽלָה׃
verses.king_james: O let the nations be glad and sing for joy: for thou shalt judge the people righteously, and govern the nations upon earth. Selah.

verses.latin_vulgate: Confiteantur tibi populi, Deus :  confiteantur tibi populi omnes.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יוֹד֖וּךָ עַמִּ֥ים ׀ אֱלֹהִ֑ים י֝וֹד֗וּךָ עַמִּ֥ים כֻּלָּֽם׃
verses.king_james: Let the people praise thee, O God; let all the people praise thee.

verses.latin_vulgate: Terra dedit fructum suum :  benedicat nos Deus, Deus noster !
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֶ֭רֶץ נָתְנָ֣ה יְבוּלָ֑הּ יְ֝בָרְכֵ֗נוּ אֱלֹהִ֥ים אֱלֹהֵֽינוּ׃
verses.king_james: Then shall the earth yield her increase; and God, even our own God, shall bless us.

verses.latin_vulgate: Benedicat nos Deus,  et metuant eum omnes fines terræ.
verses.king_james: God shall bless us; and all the ends of the earth shall fear him.
